title: The Inheritance
description: A mysterious letter summoned you to Dusty Springs to claim what's rightfully yours at an address that doesn't seem to exist. The letter is signed only with a gear symbol.

stages.title: Arrive in Dusty Springs
stages.description: You've arrived on the last train into Dusty Springs. Find the address mentioned in the mysterious letter.
stages.onStartText: The train hisses to a stop. Dusty Springs. The letter said to find '14 Copper Street.' Time to get your bearings.
stages.onCompleteText: The address leads to a burned-out lot. Whatever was here is gone, but the fire looks recent.

objectives.description: Explore Dusty Springs and get your bearings

objectives.hint: Ask the locals about Copper Street.

stages.title: Investigate the Burned Building
stages.description: The address from the letter is now a burned ruin. Someone didn't want you finding what was here.
stages.onStartText: The building burned down within the last week. Charred timbers and ash. But fires leave traces...
stages.onCompleteText: You found evidence this was a Freeminer safehouse. And something else - a partial manifest mentioning 'The Old Works.'

objectives.description: Search the burned building for clues

stages.title: Talk to Sheriff Cole
stages.description: Sheriff Marcus Cole might know something about the fire.
stages.onStartText: The Sheriff's office is on Main Street. Cole has a reputation for being one of the few straight shooters left.
stages.onCompleteText: Cole confirmed your suspicions. IVRC inspectors came through asking about a Freeminer named Samuel Ironpick.

objectives.description: Find Sheriff Cole at the Sheriff's Office
Ask Sheriff Cole about the fire

stages.title: Travel to Freeminer's Hollow
stages.description: Sheriff Cole pointed you toward Freeminer's Hollow in the Iron Mountains.
stages.onStartText: The road to Freeminer's Hollow is long and passes through rough country. Watch yourself.
stages.onCompleteText: You've reached Freeminer's Hollow. Old Samuel Ironpick recognizes the gear symbol. 'Your parent sent that letter,' he says. 'Before IVRC killed them.'

title: Missing Cattle
description: Silas Blackwood of Sunset Ranch reports that his cattle have been disappearing. He suspects rustlers but needs proof.

stages.title: Investigate the Rustling
stages.description: Check the pastures for signs of how the cattle are being taken.

objectives.description: Speak with Rosa Martinez, the foreman
Find cattle tracks in the west pasture
Follow the tracks to their source

stages.title: Confront the Rustlers
stages.description: The trail leads to a Copperhead operation. Deal with the rustlers.

stages.title: Report to Blackwood
stages.description: Return to Silas Blackwood with the evidence.

objectives.description: Return to Silas Blackwood with the ledger

title: Doc's Dilemma
description: Doc Chen Wei is running low on critical medical supplies. The nearest source is either Junction City (expensive) or Coppertown (dangerous).

stages.title: Get the Supply List
stages.description: Doc Chen Wei will give you a list of what's needed.

objectives.description: Speak with Doc Chen Wei about supplies

stages.title: Acquire Medical Supplies
stages.description: Get the medical supplies from either Junction City or Coppertown.

objectives.hint: Costs 20 gold but you might attract attention.

stages.title: Deliver to Doc
stages.description: Bring the medical supplies back to Doc Chen Wei.

objectives.description: Deliver supplies to Doc Chen Wei
